name: Peanut Butter and Oatmeal Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the white sugar and brown sugar until well combined.
2. Add the shortening and peanut butter to the bowl, stirring until evenly distributed.
3. Beat in the eggs, one at a time, ensuring they are fully incorporated.
4. Stir in the flour, baking soda, salt, vanilla, and cinnamon until just combined.
5. Gradually add the quick oats and mix until the dough forms small balls.
6. Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C).
7. Place the small cookie dough balls on a greased baking sheet.
8. Bake for 12 minutes or until lightly golden brown.
9. Turn off the oven and allow the cookies to cool on the baking sheet for a few minutes before removing them.
